title: The Price of Bonney’s Freedom
description: On pages 15–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Bonney, Nusjuro, Luffy, World Government as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So this is the outside world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: There's so much dirt... and grass!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a miracle!! There really is a God!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I never thought I'd see the day!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where's Bonney?! I just saw the Queen Dowager outside...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We made the ship look like a pizza for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'You think 'You can get away from me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll beat '10J to within an inch of '10JR life!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll keep "10J changed up day and night, that'll make things much easier!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's one of the six powers!!

dialogue.speaker: Nusjuro
dialogue.text: I was ordered to eliminate any accomplices!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they say his body was all rubbery...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and there was no limit to what he could do in a fight...

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: The government would soon receive word...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that their hostage, Bonney, escaped to find her father.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like Luffy and the others, her vessel would gain fame...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would go from a humble fishing boat to an infamous pirate ship in the new era--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A young girl heading for the future!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
